summary: Frontend updated to surface V3.1 decision data while preserving the existing UI structure and legacy behavior where needed.

changes.change: Replaced the legacy best-strategy summary render path with direct /api/decision/{lottery_type} payload rendering.
changes.user_visible_effect: The next-draw panel now shows EV gate status, Kelly fraction, monetary EV, current jackpot, breakeven jackpot, suggested bet count, monthly budget, and Stage2 gate status.

changes.change: Added V3.1 decision rows to the explainability block.
changes.user_visible_effect: Expanded decision details now include EV gate, Kelly, estimated EV, bet count, and Stage2 sample / hit rate.

changes.change: Added an optional jackpot input plus a live decision preview panel.
changes.user_visible_effect: Users can compare a manual jackpot value or backend jackpot value before writing a draw, without changing the submit payload.
Tracking tables now remain stable even if the backend uses num_bets, avg_bets, bet_count, or n_bets for the visible count.

validation: node --check passed for the edited JavaScript modules
Live API requests succeeded for /api/decision/BIG_LOTTO, /api/decision/DAILY_539, and /api/next-draw-summary
The edited files were re-checked after refactoring to remove editor warnings
follow_up: Visually verify the next-draw summary panel in the browser.
If the backend later exposes a richer legacy summary endpoint, consider harmonizing /api/decision/best-strategy-summary with the direct decision payload.
